hero.title: Your Website Deserves to Be Found — On Google & AI
hero.subtitle: SEO isn't enough anymore. ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity are changing how people search. RankFlow helps you optimize for both traditional search engines and AI-powered platforms — all in one dashboard.

features.title: Everything You Need to Rank Higher
features.subtitle: From traditional SEO to generative AI optimization, RankFlow covers every channel where your audience discovers content.
features.seo_desc: Full technical, on-page & content analysis with 7-category scoring that covers everything from meta tags to Core Web Vitals.
features.geo_desc: Generative Engine Optimization — get cited by ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and dominate AI-powered search results.
features.roadmap_desc: Prioritized improvement plan with step-by-step tasks generated by AI to fix issues in order of impact.
features.multilang_desc: Reports in Turkish, English, German, French and 6 more languages. Analyze websites in any language.
features.pdf_desc: Professional, white-label ready PDF reports for your clients with your own branding and logo.
features.cms_desc: AI fixes schema, meta tags, hreflang directly on your CMS. Available on the Agency plan for WordPress and more.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
